name: copilot-bro
description: Use DeepSeek, Z.AI GLM, MiniMax, Kimi, Qwen, vision proxy, prompt presets, and OpenAI-compatible models in VS Code Copilot Chat.

extendedModels.openModelSettings.default: Run command: Copilot Bro: Open Model Settings
extendedModels.openModelSettings.markdownDescription: Open the visual model configuration UI: [Copilot Bro: Open Model Settings](command:extendedModels.openModelSettings). This entry is intentionally visible in Settings as a direct shortcut.

extendedModels.includeBuiltInPresets.description: Show built-in DeepSeek, Zhipu / Z.AI, MiniMax, Kimi, and Qwen presets in the Copilot model picker.

extendedModels.defaultBaseUrl.description: Default OpenAI-compatible base URL used when a model does not define baseUrl.

id.description: Provider model ID, for example deepseek-v4-pro or glm-5.1.

displayName.description: Name shown in the Copilot model picker.

configId.description: Optional suffix to distinguish multiple configurations for the same model.

provider.description: Provider key used for grouping API keys, for example deepseek or zhipu.

providerDisplayName.description: Human-readable provider name shown in the model picker.

category.description: Model group shown as detail text, for example Coder, Reasoning, or Vision.

family.description: Model family hint for VS Code prompts.

vision.description: Whether the model accepts image input.

visionProxyModelId.description: Optional model ID used to describe images before this model receives the request. Empty uses the global default for non-vision models; null disables proxying for this model.

toolCalling.description: Whether the model supports OpenAI function tool calls.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Use null to omit it.

topP.description: Top-p sampling value. Use null to omit it.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort value sent as reasoning_effort.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers. Sensitive values are redacted from logs.

extraBody.description: Extra JSON fields merged into the request body after standard fields.

parameterHints.description: UI metadata for common parameter ranges and recommended values.

documentationUrl.description: Provider documentation URL for this model.

includeReasoningInRequest.description: Include assistant reasoning_content in subsequent requests when available.

editTools.description: Preferred VS Code edit tools exposed to the model.

extendedModels.retry.description: Retry settings for retryable provider and network errors.

default.prompt: Describe the visual contents of each image in detail for a coding assistant. Include visible text, UI state, diagrams, errors, layout, colors, and any details needed to answer the user's request. Be factual and do not solve the task yourself.

extendedModels.visionProxy.description: Vision proxy settings. Non-vision models can use another image-capable model, including built-in Copilot models, to describe images before the current model continues.

enabled.description: Enable the global vision proxy for models that do not have native vision input.

defaultModelId.description: Preferred vision-capable model ID. Leave empty to auto-pick an installed image-capable Copilot model.

prompt.default: Describe the visual contents of each image in detail for a coding assistant. Include visible text, UI state, diagrams, errors, layout, colors, and any details needed to answer the user's request. Be factual and do not solve the task yourself.
prompt.description: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments.

extendedModels.promptPresets.description: Prompt preset selection. Presets use *.copilot-bro.prompt.md files from built-in, global, or workspace folders.

selectedId.description: Selected prompt preset ID. Use Copilot Bro: Select Prompt Preset to change it.

extendedModels.requestTimeoutMs.description: Connection and stream idle timeout in milliseconds. Active streaming responses can run longer than this value.

extendedModels.uiLanguage.description: Language used by the visual configuration page.
